text:
Once upon an afternoon in an ordinary town, Tommy noticed his old treehouse disappearing behind trees. Determined?That's exactly what he felt.

Hours later, draped in camouflage, Tommy prowled the woods. That tree? Maybe it wasn't old enough. With meticulous care?

Hours turned into days.

By dusk, weary from adventure...

Thunk!

It was just an old owl.

Tommy apologized.

That night…

A warmth...

Tommy listened.

A deep hoot...

Some wisdom?

"The wisdom you seek lies..."

Thunk!

"...in finding your place."

Tommy?

 *"Well?"*

*A peaceful owl.*

"*Thanks.*

That night, peace settled.

Tomrey knew stories.


Now?

Any adventure?

Just an owl...

They became friends.

And that was all.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
